title: DeepMM: Deep Learning Based Map Matching with Data Augmentation

metrics.Note: Uses a seq2seq architecture with attention to map sparse and noisy trajectories to road segments in a latent space, augmented by a data generation mechanism.

title: GraphMM: Graph-Based Vehicular Map Matching by Leveraging Trajectory and Road Correlations

metrics.Note: GraphMM leverages Graph Neural Networks (GNN) to explicitly model the topology correlations between the trajectory graph and the road network graph for accurate matching.

title: DiffMM: Efficient Method for Accurate Noisy and Sparse Trajectory Map Matching via One Step Diffusion

metrics.Note: DiffMM is the first to model map matching through a conditional diffusion paradigm. It uses a one-step diffusion process for efficiency, significantly outperforming HMM and previous Deep Learning methods on sparse/noisy data.

title: Efficient Methods for Accurate Sparse Trajectory Recovery and Map Matching

metrics.F1-Score: Consistently achieves best result quality compared to baselines.
metrics.Speed: Orders of magnitude faster than competitors during training and inference.

note: Proposes a two-stage framework: MMA (Map Matching) formulates point-to-segment matching as a classification task over a small candidate set, and TRMMA (Trajectory Recovery) uses a dual-transformer to infer missing points along the matched route.

title: L2MM: Learning to Map Matching with Deep Models for Low-Quality GPS Trajectory Data
conference: ACM TKDD (Transactions on Knowledge Discovery from Data)

metrics.Robustness: Handles noisy, low-frequency, and non-uniform data effectively

note: L2MM formulates map matching as a sequence-to-sequence translation task using a Transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture to capture trajectory behaviors and spatial dependencies.

title: RLOMM: An Efficient and Robust Online Map Matching Framework with Reinforcement Learning

Performance.Accuracy: Significantly higher than SOTA online methods
Performance.Efficiency: High throughput suitable for online applications

metrics.Note: Models online map matching as an Online Markov Decision Process (OMDP) and uses Deep Q-Learning with a comprehensive reward function (accuracy, continuity, detour penalty) to make future-oriented matching decisions.

title: Driving with Context: Online Map Matching for Complex Roads Using Lane Markings and Scenario Recognition

metrics.Improvement: Significantly outperforms benchmarks in multilevel/complex areas.

note: An online SD map matching method that integrates lane markings (via ICP registration) and driving scenario recognition into an HMM framework to handle complex urban environments like elevated roads.
